title: Richly Roasted Ukrainian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring lamb, oregano, and a rich broth, all cooked to perfection in a claypot. This low-carb friendly dish is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the dried oregano, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt.
Rub the oregano mixture all over the lamb pieces, making sure they are evenly coated.
Heat the olive oil in the claypot over medium heat, then add the lamb pieces and brown them on all sides.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery to the claypot, cooking until the vegetables are tender.
Add the lamb broth to the claypot, bringing the mixture to a boil.
Cover the claypot and transfer it to the preheated oven, cooking for 2.5 hours.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
